output_json.decision_summary: The provided packet facts describe the functionality, voting process, and version introduction of the DeepFreeze amendment. However, none of the facts explicitly state the 'source default vote' (i.e., whether the code defaults to YES or NO for this amendment). Without explicit evidence of the default vote configuration in the source-backed description, the value cannot be inferred as YES or NO.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
